title: Shipyard user-global config
description: Schema for ~/.shipyard/config.json (user-global, applies to every repo unless overridden by the repo-level shipyard.config.json or the per-repo .shipyard/config.local.json).

$schema.description: Optional schema reference for editor autocomplete.

currency.description: Currency code for cost-tracking estimates (e.g. USD). Informational only — pricing table is in USD; conversion is left to consumers.

pricing_override.description: Optional per-model pricing overrides. Keys are model IDs (e.g. claude-opus-4-7); values are { input, output, cache_read, cache_creation } in USD per 1M tokens. Use to track Anthropic price changes between plugin releases.

authors.description: User-global trusted-author list. Accepts any GitHub login shape — plain logins (mattsears18), REST bot logins (sentry[bot]), and GraphQL app logins (app/sentry) — since the field is only a comparison key: an entry that matches nothing is a harmless no-op, so no pattern constraint is enforced (see issue #371). Repo-level trust.authors overrides this (does not merge).

default_auto_merge_policy.description: Default auto-merge policy when a repo has no shipyard.config.json or hasn't set auto_merge.policy.

exclude_repos_from_cost_tracking.description: List of owner/repo strings to exclude from cost-tracking even if cost_tracking.enabled is true at the repo level.

cost_tracking_enabled.description: Default-on cost-tracking switch. Repo-level cost_tracking.enabled overrides this.
